_comment: Goal-Allocator config. 5 risk tiers, all growth-and-above (no internal bond/cash ballast; your treasury bills + EFP are the external ballast). 'policy_weight' = target share of the managed pool for each tier; they must sum to 1.0. Within a tier, candidates are weighted by inverse-vol (risk-parity-lite) and each position is sized by the vol overlay toward 'target_vol'. The robo never PREDICTS which candidate wins; it weights + rebalances a basket you approve.

rebalance._comment: Rebalance every ~quarter (63 trading days) OR when any tier drifts >25% relative from its policy weight, whichever triggers first. New contributions are deployed to underweight tiers (free rebalancing).

data._comment: Daily adjusted-close. train_frac fixes target_vol from the train split only (no leakage).

vol_overlay._comment: Per-position weight w = clip(target_vol / forecast_vol, 0, vol_cap). vol_cap=1.0 = long-only, no leverage. forecast_vol is EWMA realized vol shifted 1 day (no look-ahead).

benchmark._comment: Static buy-and-hold benchmark to judge the allocator against. Success = comparable Sharpe with shallower drawdown + on-track goal probability.
